A MICROBURST PRODUCED STRAIGHT LINE WINDS OF 70 TO 80 MPH... PRODUCING A 9 MILE SWATH OF WIND DAMAGE THAT WAS APPROXIMATELY ONE MILE IN WIDTH. NUMEROUS TREES WERE TOPPLED OR SNAPPED... AND SEVERAL STRUCTURES SUSTAINED ROOF DAMAGE.

AN EF1 TORNADO WAS CONFIRMED BETWEEN HALLAM AND WRIGHTSVILLE BY A NWS STORM SURVEY. MAXIMUM WIND SPEEDS ARE ESTIMATED AT 90 MPH... WITH A PATH LENGTH OF APPROXIMATELY TWO MILES AND A MAXIMUM PATH WIDTH OF 100 YARDS.
